states.description: Camera app main viewfinder in photo mode
visual_cues: Z- and Z+ zoom buttons top
red shutter button bottom-center with camera icon

states.description: Camera app main viewfinder in video mode
visual_cues: red record button bottom-center with video icon

states.description: Mode selection sidebar showing Camera/Video options
Radio button dialog for selecting a resolution
Gallery view of last captured photo/video within camera
Google Lens (wrongly opened from search bar camera icon)

strategies.name: OPEN_CAMERA_APP
steps: swipe up from bottom to open app_drawer
strategies.success_signal: Live preview with MODE LIST/FILMSTRIP/Z+/Z- buttons visible
strategies.fallback: If Google Lens opened, press Home or click X then retry via app drawer (avoid search bar camera icon)

strategies.name: TAKE_PHOTO
strategies.success_signal: Thumbnail of new photo appears in bottom-right

strategies.name: SWITCH_TO_VIDEO_AND_RECORD
steps: click red record button at bottom-center
strategies.success_signal: Stop button replaced by record button and thumbnail updated
strategies.fallback: If top-right camera-toggle does not switch mode, use MODE LIST explicitly

strategies.name: ENABLE_GRID_OVERLAY
steps: in options_overlay click grid icon (slash should disappear)
strategies.fallback: If overlay not visible, click three-dot again

strategies.name: SET_SELF_TIMER
strategies.success_signal: Timer label e.g. '10s' visible near shutter

strategies.name: SWITCH_CAMERA_FRONT_BACK
strategies.fallback: Re-open options overlay and try again

strategies.name: OPEN_SETTINGS
steps: click MODE LIST to reveal sidebar
click settings gear icon highlighted in bottom-right
strategies.success_signal: Settings page with Resolution & quality, Save location, Advanced visible
strategies.fallback: If three-dot route fails, MODE_LIST + gear is the reliable path

strategies.name: SET_MAX_RESOLUTION
steps: for each of Back/Front camera photo and video: click entry, choose highest megapixel/resolution, confirm
strategies.success_signal: Each entry shows the highest available value
strategies.fallback: Cancel dialogs that opened wrong entry

strategies.name: VIEW_LAST_MEDIA_DETAILS
steps: click FILMSTRIP (or thumbnail) to open filmstrip_viewer
strategies.fallback: If tap missed, re-open overflow menu

strategies.name: DELETE_LAST_MEDIA
strategies.fallback: If item not loaded, navigate via FILMSTRIP first

strategies.name: EDIT_WITH_EXTERNAL_APP
strategies.success_signal: Target editor UI opens with the image

strategies.name: ZOOM_WITH_ZPLUS_BUTTON
steps: click Z+ button at top-right to step zoom in
or long_press Z+ to reach maximum
strategies.fallback: Use Z- to decrease if overshot

dead_ends.note: This launches Google Lens, not the Camera app. Always use the app drawer instead.
Top-right green dot is the Android privacy indicator, not interactive. Use MODE LIST instead.

dead_ends.failed_action: expecting a settings gear in main viewfinder
dead_ends.note: No gear on the main view; settings reachable via MODE LIST sidebar's gear.

dead_ends.failed_action: repeated click on Details when image fails to load
dead_ends.note: Tapping center can hide UI; re-tap to bring back top bar, or capture a fresh photo to reset state.
Triggers Wallpaper/Widgets/Home settings menu; press Back to dismiss.

categories.name: LAUNCH_APP
categories.precondition: Device at home; target app may not be on home screen
abstract_steps: Look for app icon on home screen
If absent, open the all-apps drawer (swipe up)
Tap the correct app icon (avoid lookalike shortcuts from widgets)
Wait for any splash/initialization screen
failure_modes: Tapping a search-widget icon that opens a different app
Triggering long-press home menu instead of swipe
Acting before app finishes loading
verification_checklist: Main UI of target app is visible

categories.name: CAPTURE_MEDIA
abstract_steps: Ensure correct mode (photo vs video) via mode selector
Apply optional pre-capture settings (zoom, timer, grid, lens switch)
Trigger primary capture control
For timed/long captures, wait the required duration
Stop/finalize capture if applicable
failure_modes: Capturing in the wrong mode
Tap on capture control not registering; retry needed
Stopping recording prematurely or too late
verification_checklist: Capture control returns to idle state
Recording timer reaches required duration before stop

categories.name: TOGGLE_SETTING
categories.precondition: Quick options or settings menu reachable
abstract_steps: Open the options/settings surface
Locate the toggle/cycle control for the desired feature
Tap to enable/cycle to desired state
Close menu and verify on the main UI
failure_modes: Misreading slashed icon as enabled
Cycling past the desired state
Toggling the wrong icon
verification_checklist: Behavior changes as expected on the main surface

categories.name: CONFIGURE_NUMERIC_OPTION
categories.precondition: Settings page with selectable list entries
abstract_steps: Navigate to the relevant settings submenu
Open the specific entry to reveal a list of choices
Select the desired value (e.g., highest/lowest)
Confirm and return; repeat for related entries
failure_modes: Opening the wrong entry (e.g., video vs photo)
Misidentifying the maximum/minimum option
Dialog dismissed without confirming selection
verification_checklist: Each related entry shows the intended value
No CANCEL was the final action on the dialog

categories.name: VIEW_LAST_ITEM
categories.precondition: At least one item exists in the app's media list
abstract_steps: Use the gallery/last-item shortcut from the capture surface
Confirm the most recent item is displayed
failure_modes: Opening the wrong gallery (system vs in-app)
Tapping when no item exists yet
verification_checklist: Item preview, action bar (share/edit/delete), and metadata access are visible

categories.name: QUERY_METADATA
categories.precondition: Item is open in a viewer
abstract_steps: Open the overflow/more options menu
Select the details/info action
Read required fields from the dialog
failure_modes: Tapping in immersive view hides UI controls
Menu closing before selection registers
Returning wrong field value
verification_checklist: Required field is present and value is read verbatim

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Item is open in a viewer
abstract_steps: Tap the delete/trash control
Confirm if prompted
Verify removal indicator
failure_modes: Deleting the wrong item if list wasn't sorted by recency
Missing confirmation step
verification_checklist: Returning to capture surface or list without the item

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY_VIA_CHOOSER
categories.precondition: Item open in viewer with an edit action
abstract_steps: Trigger edit action
From the app chooser, pick the requested editor
Confirm with one-time use (avoid setting default unless asked)
failure_modes: Choosing 'Always' inadvertently
Selecting a different editor than requested
verification_checklist: Target editor's UI loads with the item

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO_SUBSECTION
categories.precondition: Inside the app with a known menu structure
abstract_steps: Open the main/overflow menu
Drill into the targeted submenu
Verify the section title
failure_modes: Menu tap not registering
Mistaking a tooltip target for the menu
verification_checklist: Header text of subsection matches the goal

categories.name: RECOVER_FROM_WRONG_APP
abstract_steps: Close the wrong app via X/back/Home
Re-enter the app drawer instead of widgets
Launch the correct app icon
failure_modes: Repeatedly clicking the same wrong shortcut
Launcher becoming unresponsive after rapid actions
verification_checklist: Target app's main UI is now visible
